description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the elixir:1.3.1 Docker image with a postgres:latest service and defines the variables MIX_ENV=test, POSTGRESQL_DB=blogie_test, POSTGRESQL_HOST=postgres, POSTGRESQL_PASSWORD='', POSTGRESQL_USER=postgres. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update, apt-get install -y build-essential postgresql-client git, mix local.hex --force, mix local.rebar, mix deps.get, mix ecto.create and mix ecto.migrate. Define a test job in the default test stage that executes the command mix test. No artifacts, caches, or conditional rules are required.
